regions.text: This is a looking glass. What do you see in the looking glass? I see a girl's face in the glass.
She is looking at herself in the glass. What does she see in the looking glass? She sees herself in the glass.
She seems to be here. She is here. She is on this side of the glass. She seems to be on the other side of the glass.
Why? Because the glass sends the light back. There seem to be two girls in this picture. There is only one.
